comments.p: gurudeva! kṛpā-bindu diyā, koro’ ei dāse
jīv jāgo, jīv jāgo, gaurāchā̐da bole

page.audio: ($APP_BUNDLE)/Sri Krishna Chaitanya Prabhu jive doya kori.m4a

comments.p: bhaja re bhaja re āmār mana ati manda
hari haraye namaḥ kṛṣṇa jādavāya namaḥ
bhāi-re! śorīra avidyā-jāl, joḍendriya tāhe kāl
śrī kṛṣṇa chaitanya prabhu doyā koro more

page.audio: ($APP_BUNDLE)/Sri Krishna Chaitanya Prabhu Doya Koro More.m4a

comments.p: ohe vaiṣṇava ṭhākura, doyāra sāgara, e dāse koruṇā kori
dhana mora nityānanda pati mora gaurachandra
dayāl nitāi chaitanya bo’le nāch re āmār man
gaurāṅgera duṭi pada, jār dhana sampada
jadi gaura nā ho’to, tobe ki hoito
ke jabi ke jabi bhāi bhava-sindhu pāra

title.p: Various Songs to the Vaiṣṇava Acharyas

content-title.p: Various Songs to the Vaiṣṇava Acharyas

comments.p: mānasa, deho, geho, jo kichū mora

title.p: Vaiṣṇava Ke?— “Who is a Real Vaiṣṇava?”

content-title.p: Vaiṣṇava Ke?— “Who is a Real Vaiṣṇava?”

comments.p: ki jāni ki bole, tomāra dhāmete
hari he dayāla mora jaya rādhā-nātha

title.p: Śrī Śikṣāṣṭakam by Śrīla Bhaktivinoda Ṭhākur

content-title.p: Śrī Śikṣāṣṭakam by Śrīla Bhaktivinoda Ṭhākur

comments.p: na dhanaṁ na janaṁ na sundarīṁ
jaya rādhe, jaya kṛṣṇa, jaya vṛndāvan
śuno, he rasika jon kṛṣṇa guṇa agaṇon
kṛṣṇa hoite chatur-mukha, hon kṛṣṇa sevonmukha
nadīyā-nagare nitāi neche neche gāy re
nagara bhramiyā āmāra gaura elo ghore
guror guro me paramo gurus tvaṁ
atha govardhane ramye surabhi gauḥ samudrajā
